items.title: Allstate quarterly profit jumps on underwriting strength
items.description: Allstate reported a jump in second-quarter profit on Wednesday, driven by strong underwriting performance and increased investment returns. Property and casualty insurers benefited during the quarter as individuals and businesses continued spending on insurance policies amid macroeconomic uncertainty and concerns over severe weather-related catastrophes. Underwriting income in Allstate's property-liability segment jumped to $1.28 billion in the second quarter, up from a loss of $145 million in the year-ago period.

items.title: NMI Holdings Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates on Higher Premiums
items.description: NMIH tops Q2 estimates as higher premiums and investment income offset lower persistency and rising claims.
